takeaways: Automation reduces operational delays and manual errors.
Faster turnaround and measurable productivity gains.

sections.content: Manual processes limit scalability and introduce inefficiencies. Businesses require smarter systems to remain competitive.
Workflow mapping, system integration, automation implementation, and ongoing optimization support.
Clients can expect improved efficiency, cost reduction, and better operational visibility.

path: Home / Events & Announcement / Scheduled Delivery Feature Now Live
title: Scheduled Delivery Feature Now Live
author: TMC Editorial Team
summary: The Scheduled Delivery Feature, effective February 10, 2026, allows customers to order meals up to 7 days in advance, combining convenience with precise planning for both individual and corporate users. It includes set-and-forget ordering, planning all weekly meals in one session, and ensuring vital meals arrive on time, while also supporting seamless corporate catering. Users simply select meals, choose a delivery date and time at checkout, and receive notifications when their order is en route. The platform manages ordering systematically to ensure peak freshness and integrates with Google and Outlook calendars for automated reminders. It is free for all customers and available from all partner restaurants.
takeaways: Advance ordering available for all partner restaurants starting today.
Integration with Google and Outlook calendars for automated reminders.
Corporate accounts enable team announcement link views for multi-order tracking.

sections.content:
In the fast-paced world of restaurant logistics, timing is everything. While instant delivery caters to immediate cravings, many customers—particularly corporate clients and busy families—need the assurance of a planned meal.

• Ultimate Convenience: Set it and forget it. Perfect for recurring team meetings.
• Friday Mornings: Order catering for the entire week in one session.
• Reduced Peak Traffic: Helps kitchens prepare for large orders during off-peak hours.
• Corporate Catering: Seamless integration for all catered planners.

1. Select Meals: Choose your favorite dishes and add them to your cart as usual.
2. Pick a Time: At checkout, select "Schedule" and choose a date up to 7 days away.
3. Relax: We'll handle the rest and notify you when your meal is en route.

Our platform intelligently manages kitchen queues to prioritize these scheduled orders, ensuring that the preparation starts precisely at the right time to maintain peak freshness upon arrival.
